LanguageData.ABY_ForgeDevResidueDesc: Adds 1000 residue directly into forge communion progress without consuming map items.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeDevResidueApplied: DEV: added {0} residue. Total attuned residue: {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeDevImmortalityDesc: Open a dev-only pawn list and toggle the test immortality anchor on any spawned pawn on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeDevImmortalityNoPawns: No valid spawned pawns were found on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_TestImmortalityAdded: {0} is now protected by the dev immortality anchor.
LanguageData.ABY_TestImmortalityRemoved: {0} is no longer protected by the dev immortality anchor.
LanguageData.ABY_TestImmortalityPawnGizmoDesc: Remove the dev immortality anchor from this pawn.
